text_block_list.text:
With both the upcoming G1 race and the rematch
with Narita Brian to prepare for, we're hard at
training. On a day like any other...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Teach!

Hishi Amazon comes running into my office with a
pained expression.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: It's Brian! She's—

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
The URA has revealed that Narita Brian, last
year's Triple Crown champion, has suffered an
injury.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
She will take a pause from racing to recover, and
is projected to make a return in the fall.

Narita Brian is widely known as one of the best
racers around. The news of her injury shocks the
world of Umamusume racing.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Wait, Narita Brian got hurt?! I hope she's okay...

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure it's nothing to worry about. Someone that
amazing will be back and racing hard by next
year, I'm sure.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's true... She wouldn't be the first one
to make a comeback after getting injured!
While they aren't wrong, there have been just as many careers lost as salvaged.

Brian has arthritis in her right hip, which could
resurface even after an initial recovery. Things
aren't looking optimistic...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right, we've got salted daifuku and rice
crackers... Should I bring some books? And
maybe some dumbbells? Nah, scratch the
weights...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hayahide probably has the necessities covered,
so this is probably all we need.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Let's get going, Teach. Remember, no sad faces
and no moping!

It's been a few days since the revelation of Narita
Brian's injury, and the two of us have decided to
pay her a visit.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I had a feeling you would come, but... That is
some care package you've got there.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, it's always better to have too much than too
little! More importantly, how are you feeling?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Haven't had a moment's rest, with all you
visitors... But I should be back on the track this
fall.

Hishi Amazon cheers up a little on hearing the
news straight from the source.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: ...Good. Hehe, glad to hear it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, I was half-expecting to be let down by
some bad news.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Don't you start worrying over me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
No point in startin', judging by your expression.
Well, I'll just leave off with this, then!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You better be healed up come the next Arima
Kinen! I'll be waiting!

Narita Brian regards Hishi Amazon coolly as she
issues her impassioned directive.

Eventually, Narita Brian is discharged from the
hospital.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: She's waiting for me, huh...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey! And here I was, wonderin' where you'd gone!
You're fresh out of the hospital, so you shouldn't
be out and about!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Ama.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I've been wondering... Why do you keep fussing
over me?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What's with the weird question all of a
sudden?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
When you visited me in the hospital, you said
you'd be waiting for me at the Arima Kinen. Why
is that?

Hishi Amazon looks to the sky, as if to search for
the right words to answer with.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well... It's 'cause I can't wait to have a
one-on-one with you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I get chills whenever I run alongside you. I can
feel the beast in you when we race. And no matter
how far you run ahead...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I get the feeling I'll overtake you one day.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Come on, say something! It's embarrassing with
you just starin' at me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You want to overtake me, huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I have someone I want to overtake too. I finally
see where you're coming from, Ama.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...I'm not going to give up running. You don't
have to worry about that.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Wha? Wait, where do you think you're going?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Use the handrail while you're walking down the
stairs! Are you even listening to me?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So yeah, that happened. Man, Brian's as aloof as
ever.
choice_data_list: I'm glad she's feeling better, though.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yeah, same. Better than moping about.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm a little curious who that "someone" of hers is...
but it'd be rude to pry, huh? She's got her own
stuff goin' on.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, there's only one thing to do now—train
like there's no tomorrow until winter comes!

After seeing Narita Brian acting like her normal
self, Hishi Amazon brightens up as well.
